com.pdfsolid.conversion

Class LibraryManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pdfsolid.conversion.LibraryManager

  • public class LibraryManager
extends java.lang.Object
    Manages all operations related to the SDK library. The `LibraryManager` class serves as a central hub for managing the lifecycle of an SDK library. It provides functionalities such as initializing the library with specified resources, verifying licenses, installing fonts, setting up logging and progress callbacks, retrieving version information, and counting pages in documents.

    • Method Summary

      Retrieves the number of pages in a PDF document.

      Returns the remaining page quota.

      Returns the current version of the SDK library.

      Initializes the SDK library.
      static ErrorCode licenseVerify(java.lang.String license)
      Checks the validity of the license.
      static ErrorCode licenseVerify(java.lang.String license, java.lang.String deviceID, java.lang.String appID)
      Checks the validity of the license.
      static void release()
      Releases and cleans up SDK resources.
      static void releaseAIModel()
      Release the Document AI model resource.
      static int setDocumentAIModel(java.lang.String modelPath)
      Configures the Document AI model used for OCR.
      static int setDocumentAIModel(java.lang.String modelPath, int gpuId)
      Configures the Document AI model used for OCR with GPU support.
      static void setDocumentAIModelCount(int layoutModelCount, int tableModelCount)
      Sets the number of AI models for layout analysis and table recognition.
      static void setLogger(boolean enableInfo, boolean enableWarning)
      Enables or disables SDK logging output.

    • Method Detail

      • initialize

        public static void initialize(java.lang.String resourcePath)
        Initializes the SDK library.
        Parameters:
        resourcePath - The path to the SDK resource directory.

      • licenseVerify

        public static ErrorCode licenseVerify(java.lang.String license)
        Checks the validity of the license.
        Parameters:
        license - The license file Path.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the permission check.

      • licenseVerify

        public static ErrorCode licenseVerify(java.lang.String license,
                                      java.lang.String deviceID,
                                      java.lang.String appID)
        Checks the validity of the license.
        Parameters:
        license - The license file Path.
        deviceID - The device ID bound to the license.
        appID - The application ID bound to the license.
        Returns:
        An ErrorCode indicating the result of the permission check.

      • release

        public static void release()
        Releases and cleans up SDK resources.

      • getVersion

        public static java.lang.String getVersion()
        Returns the current version of the SDK library.
        Returns:
        A string representing the version number.

      • setDocumentAIModel

        public static int setDocumentAIModel(java.lang.String modelPath)
        Configures the Document AI model used for OCR.
        Parameters:
        modelPath - The file path to the AI model.
        Returns:
        0 if successful, otherwise an error code.

      • setDocumentAIModel

        public static int setDocumentAIModel(java.lang.String modelPath,
                                     int gpuId)
        Configures the Document AI model used for OCR with GPU support.
        Parameters:
        modelPath - The file path to the AI model.
        gpuId - The GPU device ID to use, or -1 to disable GPU acceleration.
        Returns:
        0 if successful, otherwise an error code.

      • releaseAIModel

        public static void releaseAIModel()
        Release the Document AI model resource.

      • setDocumentAIModelCount

        public static void setDocumentAIModelCount(int layoutModelCount,
                                           int tableModelCount)
        Sets the number of AI models for layout analysis and table recognition.
        Parameters:
        layoutModelCount - Number of layout analysis models to be used.
        tableModelCount - Number of table recognition models to be used.

      • getPageCount

        public static int getPageCount(java.lang.String filePath,
                               java.lang.String password)
        Retrieves the number of pages in a PDF document.
        Parameters:
        filePath - The path to the PDF file.
        password - The password for the document, or an empty string if not protected.
        Returns:
        The total number of pages in the document.

      • getRemainingPageQuota

        public static int getRemainingPageQuota()
        Returns the remaining page quota.
        Returns:
        More than 0: actual remaining pages, -1: not initialized, -2: unlimited, -3: quota file corrupted.

      • setLogger

        public static void setLogger(boolean enableInfo,
                             boolean enableWarning)
        Enables or disables SDK logging output.
        Parameters:
        enableInfo - Whether to enable informational logs.
        enableWarning - Whether to enable warning logs.
